name: ns
description: NS is a local-file based single-novel writing studio with YAML memory in novel-studio/ and chapter text organized by volumes and extras.

interface.shortDescription: Local-file based single-novel writing studio for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Novel Studio helps Codex write one novel from the current folder: YAML long-term memory lives in novel-studio/, while chapter text is organized under volumes/ and extras/.
defaultPrompt: 把当前文件夹初始化为一部小说项目。
为这部小说建立 novel-studio/ YAML 长期记忆。
基于当前小说记忆写下一章。
